title: Chewy Q3 2022 Earnings Preview: What's in the Cards?
text: As Chewy prepared for Q3 2022 earnings, the consensus EPS estimate was -$0.04 (50.0% Y/Y improvement) and consensus revenue estimate was $2.21 billion (24.2% Y/Y growth). The preview highlighted continued deceleration in growth as pandemic effects fully normalized. Investors remained cautious about profitability pathways during a period of economic uncertainty. Gross margins were expected to remain under pressure as the company balanced growth and profitability. The quarter represented a key inflection point where Chewy demonstrated its ability to control costs and improve unit economics despite slowing growth. Holiday season demand for pet supplies provided some tailwind, though uncertain consumer sentiment created headwinds.
